title: Bell Now Craftable
description: 🔔 Bell Now Craftable — a mod that adds a recipe for crafting the bell right in your workbench. Now you can decorate your village, temple, or base without searching villages. A simple and convenient solution for your world!
body:
**✨ **Bell Now Craftable — the bell is now available!** ✨**  

Have you ever wanted to decorate your village or base with a real bell but couldn’t find one? Now you can craft it yourself!  
The **Bell Now Craftable** mod unlocks the recipe for crafting a bell right in your workbench.  

🔔 **Mod Features:**  
- Adds a recipe for crafting the bell  
- Perfect for decorating villages, temples, or your base  
- Fully compatible with other mods  
- Simple and convenient — no need to search villages just for one bell  

💡 **Why try it:**  
The bell is not only a decorative item, but also a symbol of comfort and protection. With this mod, you decide where and when it will ring.  

---  

Would you like me to polish this further into a **CurseForge‑style page layout** (with sections like *Description*, *Features*, *Installation*) so it looks ready to publish?
